arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss details Callum Lang outlook after injury blow to key figure at Oxford United
arts.sum: Pompey boss John Mousinho is optimistic Callum Lang is not looking at a lengthy period out after his Oxford United injury setback.

arts.ttl: Influential Portsmouth defender out for up to two months following results of scan
arts.sum: Pompey have learnt the extent of Conor Shaughnessy’s hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: 'What a prospect, Heartbreaking sight, What an exciting prospect': Neil Allen's Portsmouth player ratings against Oxford United
arts.sum: Pompey made it successive wins with a huge victory at Oxford United.

arts.ttl: Pompey secure rare away win at Oxford
arts.sum: Second-half goals from Andre Dozzell and Mark O'Mahony earned Portsmouth a 2-0 victory at Oxford, inflicting a first home defeat on Gary Rowett since he took charge at the Kassam Stadium.

arts.ttl: Second-half goals earn Portsmouth rare away win with victory at Oxford
arts.sum: The success ended a run of seven straight defeats on the road for Pompey.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth end away woe at Oxford United after medical emergency
arts.sum: Pompey banished their nightmare away run with a big 2-0 win at Oxford United.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth dealt fresh injury concern as forward withdrawn against Oxford clasping hamstring
arts.sum: Pompey have been dealt another fresh injury concern.

arts.ttl: Oxford v Portsmouth suspended after medical emergency as players taken off pitch
arts.sum: Oxford United and Portsmouth had played just 15 minutes of their Championship game on Saturday when a medical emergency ocurred in the stands, with both sets of players taken off the pitch while staff attended to the situation

arts.ttl: Breaking: Portsmouth clash with Oxford United halted after medical emergency
arts.sum: Pompey’s clash with Oxford has been halted today following a medical emergency.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth fans all same same thing as starting XI and bench named for Oxford United game
arts.sum: Pompey fans on social media have been reacting to John Mousinho’s starting XI for today’s game at Oxford United.
